Playlist_output_desc:
* Do not put important data in either output folder. The two output folders must be different.
Custom folders for playlists are written to Output (normal folder).
Playlists with "Use as root folder" enabled in their properties are written to Output (root folder). They appear at the root of the music select screen for quick access.

Msg_confirm_skip_init_file_check:
BMS files and related files will not be checked for changes at startup.
Initialization will be faster, but newly added charts and install destination estimation will not update until you manually reload folders.

This change takes effect after restart.
Msg_confirm_skip_init_playlist_load:
Playlist update checks will not run at startup.

This change takes effect after restart.
Msg_confirm_enable_offline_score_ranking:
Offline ranking estimation for unsent scores will run when LR2IR ranking cache data is applied.
Additional ranking cache XML may be read for charts whose local score is higher than the LR2IR score.

This change takes effect after restart.
Msg_confirm_enable_lr2ir_ranking_cache_s:
LR2IR ranking cache will be updated after startup.
This updates the RANKING, RANK UPDATE, T-SCORE, and ΔMAX columns, but CPU and disk usage may increase significantly during the first build or after changing LR2ID.

This change takes effect after restart.

AppSchemaRepairWarningMessage:
BeMusicSeeker related data will be repaired to the current format.

If SHA-256 generation is needed during repair, it may take a long time depending on the size of your library.
After the update, the DB may no longer be compatible with the original BeMusicSeeker or this fork up to v1.2.1.0.
If you are concerned about compatibility, backing up song.db and related files beforehand is recommended.
